title: FPS Craft(Builder's Edition)
description:
Mod focusing on fps boost and make building in minecraft super easy. 

Note:- If your computer does not have a nvidia graphics card, them you have to remove nvidium mod from the mod folder in order it to work properly.
body:
FPS Craft (Builder's Edition) is a Minecraft modpack specially crafted for builders who want a smooth and lag-free experience while focusing on construction. It combines FPS-boosting mods with a suite of building-focused enhancements, allowing players to create detailed structures with ease. The pack includes performance optimization mods to maximize frame rates, such as Sodium and  Lithium and much more reducing lag even on lower-end hardware.

For building efficiency, FPS Craft introduces mods like Tweakeroo and Axiom, adding features like block rotation, easy placement, extended reach, and grid-based alignment. The streamlined interface and useful tools let you control fine details with precision, while the FPS boost mods ensure your gameplay stays fluid, even in large builds. Ideal for players looking to build ambitious creations without compromising game performance, FPS Craft (Builder's Edition) brings out the best of Minecraft’s creative possibilities.
